questions.question_text: Explain the theoretical perspectives of Sindhi folklore and provide your own analysis regarding its foundational basis.
What significance do folk tunes hold in Sindhi folk literature?
Write a note on the characteristics of ballads.
Write a note on the art and purpose of the novel 'Hamaust'.
Discuss the fundamental importance of representation in the poetry of Shah Abdul Latif with examples.
Debate on why Sindhi poetry did not progress much during Mir's era with examples.
Illustrate the growth of Sindhi prose during the British period with examples.
Translate the given Sindhi paragraph into English.
Translate the given English paragraph into Sindhi.
